manifest.name: WeChat Multi Publisher

name: WeChat Multi Publisher

releases.author: Kianzzz
releases.description:
Addresses the Obsidian Community automated review for the new `wechat-multi-publisher` listing.

- Moves temporary export layout rules into CSS classes.
- Adds an English README overview, installation guide, and privacy disclosure.
- Replaces the deprecated build helper and require-style Node imports.
- Fixes Promise and popout-window timer warnings.
- Verified on Obsidian 1.12.7 alongside MP Preview 1.0.6, including long-image export.
releases.name: WeChat Multi Publisher 2.3.2

releases.author: Kianzzz
releases.description:
Renames the plugin to WeChat Multi Publisher with the unique community ID `wechat-multi-publisher`.

- Keeps multi-account publishing and SecretStorage credential handling from 2.3.0.
- Uses the new view and credential namespaces.
- Verified on Obsidian 1.12.7 alongside MP Preview 1.0.6.

Existing manual-install users should install this release under `.obsidian/plugins/wechat-multi-publisher/`.
releases.name: WeChat Multi Publisher 2.3.1

releases.author: Kianzzz
releases.description:
## Highlights

- Restore the complete TypeScript source and reproducible build.
- Store AppSecret, access tokens, and proxy passwords with Obsidian SecretStorage.
- Bundle all 13 themes and html2canvas into main.js for Community plugin installation.
- Add default covers, optional frontmatter removal, image compression, and PNG long-image export.
- Sanitize rendered HTML and remove sensitive debug logging.
- Add release automation, security documentation, and issue templates.

## Compatibility

- Requires Obsidian 1.11.4 or later.
- Desktop only.
- Existing plaintext account secrets are migrated to SecretStorage on first load.

## Installation

Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css, or use wechat-publisher.zip.
releases.name: WeChat Publisher 2.3.0

releases.author: Kianzzz
releases.description:
## WeChat Publisher for Obsidian v2.1.2

### 安装方法

1. 下载 `wechat-publisher-v2.1.2.zip`
2. 解压到 `.obsidian/plugins/wechat-publisher/`
3. 在 Obsidian 设置 → 第三方插件中启用

### 包含内容

- 插件主文件（main.js、styles.css、manifest.json）
- 13 款内置 CSS 排版主题

### 功能

- 多账号批量发布到微信公众号草稿箱
- 13 款内置排版主题 + 自定义 CSS 支持
- 封面图片上传与图片压缩
- 实时预览排版效果
- SOCKS5 / HTTP 代理支持
releases.name: v2.1.2

releases.author: Kianzzz
releases.description:
## WeChat Publisher for Obsidian v2.1.2

### Installation

1. Download `wechat-publisher-v2.1.2.zip`
2. Extract to `.obsidian/plugins/wechat-publisher/`
3. Enable in Obsidian Settings → Community Plugins

### Features

- Multi-account batch publishing to WeChat Official Accounts
- 13 built-in CSS themes + custom CSS support
- Cover image upload with compression
- Live preview
- SOCKS5 / HTTP proxy support
